meaning: n.刻有浮雕的宝石或贝壳
examples: Each was rewarded for his efforts with a cameo.
Schwarzenegger confirmed he would be making a cameo appearance in The Expendables.
In June he made a cameo appearance in a comic tribute, "Rod Blagojevich Superstar".
Langer hit 13 boundaries in a cameo of 55 from just 86 minutes of batting.
She also made many cameo appearances parodying herself on television sitcoms and in movies.
